post.description: Exchange a bot ID and secret token for a JWT access token.

get.description: Returns instance information for federation, including the public key for verifying handle attestations.

post.description: Generates a verification challenge for a custom domain handle. Returns the DNS TXT record and well-known file content to add for verification.
Verifies the custom domain by checking DNS TXT records or well-known files. On success, updates the user's handle to the verified domain.
Generates a verification challenge for a custom domain handle. Returns the DNS TXT record and well-known file content to add for verification.
Verifies the custom domain by checking DNS TXT records or well-known files. On success, updates the space's handle to the verified domain.

HandleOwner.description: Represents what entity type owns a handle

ciphertext.description: Base64-encoded MLS ciphertext for E2EE messages

MlsGroupExt.description: Serialized MlsGroup info returned to the client

created.description: True if this DM space was newly created (client must send Welcome messages)

refreshToken.description: If the refresh token is not provided, you can continue using the same refresh token.

UserExt.description: User with extended data including handle

VerificationChallenge.description: Verification challenge sent to the user

dnsTxtRecord.description: The DNS TXT record to add
